raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserting a spiritual truth through extended natural analogy to evoke recognition of latent potential",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "natural developmental processes illustrate parallel spiritual or ontological realities",
    "the soul contains a latent transcendent or divine aspect analogous to embryonic life",
    "this aspect can awaken or become manifest under conditions of heightened vision",
    "the three examples form a single coherent hierarchy of unfolding being"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as poetic metaphor; the analogies align in structure and direction of emergence",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "recipient accepts analogical and symbolic modes of insight and finds the image experientially resonant or generative of meaning",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "recipient interprets the claim as literal ontology or empirical prediction rather than evocative metaphor, or applies it to justify unexamined supernatural beliefs"
}
